name: floor-otc
description: Trustless token swaps for AI agents on Base. Two paths — relay agent-signed orders to CoW Protocol for instant batch-auction settlement (zero capital, MEV-protected, ~30s fills), or create a 1:1 on-chain escrow for human OTC. Both atomic, no middleman, no admin keys.
author: Agora0x
protocol_fee_note: 0.25% on every fill. CoW relay path: routed by solvers via partnerFee in the appData the trader signs. FloorEscrowV2 path: deducted from each side on settlement, immutable in contract. Zero spread on quotes.

cow_relay.type: off-chain order book + on-chain batch auction

floor_escrow_v2.custody: smart contract escrow, no admin keys

skills.name: Get OTC Quote
skills.description: Get a live token swap quote at real CoinGecko market rates. Zero spread.

arguments.from_token: string — token symbol (e.g. USDC, WETH, DAI)
arguments.amount: number — amount of from_token to swap

examples: Get a quote for swapping 1000 USDC to WETH
How much DAI can I get for 5000 USDC?

skills.name: Execute OTC Trade
skills.description: Create a trustless on-chain escrow for a token swap on Base. Both parties deposit, settlement is atomic.

trade.next_steps: Buyer and seller must approve + deposit tokens

examples: Swap 1000 USDC for DAI through escrow

skills.name: Check Trade Status
skills.description: Check the on-chain status of an existing escrow trade by its trade ID.

trade.status: Created | BuyerDeposited | SellerDeposited | BothDeposited | Settled | Expired | Refunded

skills.name: Get Live Prices
skills.description: Get current token prices from CoinGecko for all supported tokens.
examples: What are the current token prices?

skills.name: Prepare CoW Order
skills.description: Build a CoW Protocol order for the calling agent's wallet to sign. FLOOR returns the EIP-712 typed data, the appData document with FLOOR's 25 bps partnerFee baked in, a CoW quote, and a preflight check on the trader's sell-token balance and GPv2VaultRelayer allowance. The trader signs locally — FLOOR never custodies funds. The 25 bps fee is enforced because the appData hash is part of what the trader signs.

arguments.sell_token: string — token symbol (USDC, USDT, USDbC, DAI, WETH)
arguments.trader_address: string — 0x address of the calling agent's wallet

output.order: GPv2Order struct (sellToken, buyToken, receiver, sellAmount, buyAmount, validTo, appData, feeAmount, kind, partiallyFillable, sellTokenBalance, buyTokenBalance)

typed_data.domain: EIP-712 domain for Gnosis Protocol v2 on Base

app_data.hash: bytes32 — keccak256 of the canonical appData JSON, signed inside the order
app_data.document: the appData JSON object with FLOOR's partnerFee
app_data.full_string: canonical JSON string — submit this with the signed order

output.relayer: { address, approve_calldata, approve_to } — for one-time GPv2VaultRelayer approval if needed

examples: Prepare a CoW order to swap 1000 USDC for WETH from 0xMyAgent
Build a sell order: 0.5 WETH to USDC, trader 0xabc...

skills.name: Submit Signed CoW Order
skills.description: Forward a trader-signed CoW order to the CoW order book on Base. FLOOR re-checks the appData hash matches FLOOR's partnerFee doc, validates the EIP-712 signature locally (rejects if recovered != trader_address), then POSTs to api.cow.fi. Returns the orderUid and CoW explorer URL. Solvers fill in the next batch (~30s).

arguments.trader_address: string — must match the EIP-712 signer

examples: Submit signed order with signature 0x... and trader 0xabc...

skills.name: Check CoW Order
skills.description: Look up the live status of a CoW order by its 56-byte orderUid. Returns the order's state (open, fulfilled, cancelled, expired) plus executed sell/buy amounts.

authentication.note: No API key needed. Quotes are free. CoW relay (prepare_trade/submit_signed_trade) requires the calling agent's own wallet to sign orders — FLOOR never holds keys for the trader. FloorEscrowV2 path requires the A2A server to have PRIVATE_KEY configured for the escrow creator role.
